problem_solved: Connecting patients to social services and community resources is fragmented and inefficient, leading to unmet social needs that drive poor health outcomes
solution_description: Platform providing comprehensive social care network with screening tools, closed-loop referrals, and marketplace fulfillment for SDOH needs. Includes 970k+ program locations nationwide, serves 60% of US health systems with directory search, referral tracking, and analytics
traction_signals: Best in KLAS 2026 award for SDoH networks
notes: Market leader in SDOH referral platforms. Originally Aunt Bertha, rebranded to Findhelp. Strong EHR integration capabilities. Marketplace fulfillment for direct delivery of goods/services (transportation, meals, diapers)
